inputMode.title: Input Mode
inputMode.description: Choose whether to provide HTML content directly or URLs to fetch

htmlFiles.title: HTML Files (Base64 encoded)
htmlFiles.description: Array of base64-encoded HTML content for parsing. Required if inputMode is 'html'.

urls.title: URLs to Parse
urls.description: Array of URLs to fetch and parse. Required if inputMode is 'url'.

domain.title: Domain Name
domain.description: Optional domain name for organizing output

iterationRounds.title: Iteration Rounds
iterationRounds.description: Number of HTML samples to use for schema learning (default: 3)

clusterMode.title: Enable Layout Clustering
clusterMode.description: Automatically detect and group different page layouts

predefinedSchema.title: Predefined Schema Template
predefinedSchema.description: Optional schema template (JSON) for predefined mode
